net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface Row

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RowImpl

    public interface Row
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Row'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Seats
    • Row Number
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getRow()

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getRowNumber()
      Returns the value of the 'Row Number' attribute
      org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<Seat> getSeats()
      Returns the value of the 'Seats' containment reference list.
      void setRowNumber(int value)
      Sets the value of the 'Row Number' attribute

      • Methods inherited from interface org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject

        eAllContents, eClass, eContainer, eContainingFeature, eContainmentFeature, eContents, eCrossReferences, eGet, eGet, eInvoke, eIsProxy, eIsSet, eResource, eSet, eUnset

        eAdapters, eDeliver, eNotify, eSetDeliver

    • Method Detail

      • getSeats

        org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<Seat> getSeats()
        Returns the value of the 'Seats' containment reference list. The list contents are of type Seat.

        If the meaning of the 'Seats' containment reference list isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Seats' containment reference list.
        See Also:
        CabinPackage.getRow_Seats()

      • getRowNumber

        int getRowNumber()
        Returns the value of the 'Row Number' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Row Number' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Row Number' attribute.
        See Also:
        setRowNumber(int), CabinPackage.getRow_RowNumber()

      • setRowNumber

        void setRowNumber(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Row Number' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Row Number' attribute.
        See Also:
        getRowNumber()
